tail.pred: We are exposed to changes in interest rates as a result of our short-term borrowings and long-term debt. We hedge a portion of our interest rate risk by managing the mix of fixed and variable rate debt and by entering into interest rate swaps. For fiscal 2026, the net fair value of our interest rate swaps increased $0.2 billion primarily due to fluctuations in market interest rates.
